parameters.name: conditions
parameters.value: =type/id=4 AND dateEnd < [{{ $('Set Date Ranges').item.json.todayISO }}] AND status/id=1

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO goals_daily_snapshot (snapshot_date, metric_name, metric_value, category)
VALUES ('{{ $json.snapshot_date }}', '{{ $json.metric_name }}', {{ $json.metric_value }}, '{{ $json.category }}')
ON CONFLICT (snapshot_date, metric_name) DO UPDATE SET
  metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  captured_at = NOW();
